subject: fix(ui): audit fixes — BurgerMenu a11y, z-index scale, dead event
body:
Fixes discovered during post-implementation audit:

BurgerMenu:
- Remove useFocusTrap — disclosure menus use Tab-out-to-close, not
  Tab-cycling like modals
- Gate useEscapeKey on open state (new `active` param on hook)
- Return focus to trigger button on Escape
- Reset itemRefs array each render to prevent stale entries
- Add aria-orientation="horizontal" on separators

Z-index:
- Override DaisyUI .modal z-index from 999 to 60 in index.css so
  all z-values follow the documented app scale
- ConfirmDialog at z-61 (above modals, used for in-modal confirms)
- Pre-React error pill from z-99999 to z-91 (reserved range)

Other:
- Remove dead 'embedding:computed' event from EmbeddingEventMap

Tags: a11y, z-index, eventbus, audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
